item.title: Michael Alig's Disco Bloodbath

item.title: 6-Year-Old Loses Life in Tragic Treadmill Case
item.description: This video reviews a heartbreaking incident where a 6-year-old lost their life in a treadmill accident, focusing on the facts and safety lessons from the tragedy.
